info.description:
API Gateway for the Kazakhstan carsharing platform.
Provides REST and WebSocket endpoints for: authentication, user management,
fleet (cars, models, telemetry, status), bookings, trips, zones,
pricing rules, car insurance, and maintenance. Real-time updates are
available via WebSocket at /api/v1/ws.
info.title: Carsharing API Gateway

post.description: Issues a new access token using the refresh token stored in the HttpOnly cookie.

Creates a new user account. Returns the new user's ID. password 8–20 chars with complexity requirements; passwordConfirmation must match password; birthDate must indicate age ≥ 18; phoneNumber in E.164 format if provided.
Authenticates a user by email or phone + password. Returns an access token and sets an HttpOnly refresh token cookie. Exactly one of email or phoneNumber is required.
Invalidates the current session and clears the refresh token cookie.

get.description: Returns bookings filtered by optional query parameters.

post.description: Reserves a car for the authenticated user with a chosen pricing rule.
Cancels a reserved or active booking.

patch.description: Allows privileged users to override booking status with an optional reason.

get.description: Returns the chronological status change log for a booking.
Returns insurance records filtered by car, type, status, or expiry window.

parameters.description: Return policies expiring within N days (1–365)
parameters.name: expiringWithinDays

post.description: Records an ОСАГО or КАСКО policy for a specific car. type must be osago or kasko; expiresAt must be after startsAt; costTenge min 0; provider and policyNum 1–100 chars.

get.summary: Get pre-signed upload URL for insurance document images

get.description: Returns work orders for cars. Filter by car, template, or status (pending, in_progress, completed).

post.description: Marks a maintenance record as completed, resets the service interval clock, and transitions the car back to available.

get.summary: Get pre-signed upload URL for maintenance receipts

post.description: Defines a recurring service interval (e.g. oil change every 8,000 km / 180 days). kmInterval min 100 km; dayInterval min 1 day; warnPct and pullPct are proportions 0.0–1.0 (not percent), pullPct must be ≥ warnPct.
Seeds the service state baseline for a (car, template) pair. Optionally accepts an initial KM and date to reflect prior service history.
post.summary: Assign a maintenance template to a car

get.description: Returns a filtered, paginated list of car models.

post.description: Registers a new car model (e.g. Hyundai Solaris 2022). Returns the new model's UUID. year min 1886; seats 1–9; engineVolume 0.1–28.5 L if provided; warnPct and pullPct are proportions 0.0–1.0 (not percent), pullPct must be ≥ warnPct.

get.description: Returns a pre-signed S3-compatible URL and object key for uploading a car model image.
Returns cars filtered by status, location radius, fuel level, zone, and model attributes. Pass latitude+longitude+radiusM to get nearby cars sorted by distance.

post.description: Creates a new physical car record linked to a car model and telemetry device. VIN must be exactly 17 alphanumeric characters. yearManufactured minimum 1886. fuelLevel and batteryLevel 0–100 if provided.
post.summary: Register a car in the fleet

get.description: Returns a pre-signed S3-compatible URL and object key for uploading a car photo.
get.summary: Get pre-signed image upload URL for car photos

patch.description: Records an audited operational status transition for a car. status must be one of: available, reserved, in_use, maintenance, out_of_service. reason optional (1–500 chars).

get.description: Returns the immutable audit trail of every car state transition.

patch.description: Records audited sensor readings (mileage, fuel, battery, location) for a car. mileageKm min 0; fuelLevel and batteryLevel 0–100 if provided; reason optional (1–500 chars).

get.description: Returns time-series telemetry readings for a car.
Returns current-state counts for users, fleet, bookings, trips, insurance, and maintenance.
Returns the health status of the API gateway and all upstream services.
Returns pricing rules filtered by optional scope dimensions.

post.description: Defines a new pricing rule. Nil scope fields (modelID, class) act as wildcards and apply to all values of that dimension.

patch.description: Partially updates a pricing rule. Only provided fields are changed.

get.description: Returns trips filtered by optional query parameters.

parameters.description: Filter by start time lower bound (RFC3339)
parameters.name: startedAfter

parameters.description: Filter by start time upper bound (RFC3339)
parameters.name: startedBefore

post.description: Begins a trip for the given booking. The gateway captures car telemetry at this moment.
Cancels an in-progress trip with an optional reason.
Completes an in-progress trip. The gateway captures final car telemetry at this moment.

get.description: Returns the chronological status change log for a trip.
Returns the billing breakdown for a completed trip.
Returns a list of users, optionally filtered by query params.

post.description: Admin endpoint to create a user with explicit roles and activation state.
Verifies the activation code submitted by the user. code must be exactly 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters.
Sends an activation code to the current user's email or phone.
Creates a document record after the image has been uploaded to object storage.
Sets the review status of a document (e.g. approved or rejected) and optionally provides a rejection reason.
Returns a presigned PUT URL for uploading a document image to object storage.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

patch.description: Partially updates the authenticated user's own profile. Critical fields (roles, verification flags) are not accepted.

get.description: Returns a presigned PUT URL and object key for uploading the current user's profile image to object storage.
Returns a single user by their ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a user by ID.

get.description: Returns documents for the specified user, optionally filtered by status and image type, with pagination and sorting support.
WebSocket stream of maintenance events ("warn" or "pull") emitted by the background evaluator. Streams until token expiry or disconnect.
WebSocket stream of slim car objects matching the filter. Accepts the same query params as GET /cars. Streams updates until token expiry or disconnect.
WebSocket stream of status transition events for a single car. Streams until token expiry or disconnect.
WebSocket stream of telemetry updates (fuel, battery, mileage, location) for a single car. Streams until token expiry or disconnect.
WebSocket stream of in-progress trip data (elapsed time, current cost, distance). Streams until the trip ends or the client disconnects.
WebSocket stream of DocumentAnalyzedEvents from the user service. Accepts optional userId and passed query params to filter events.
Returns zones filtered by type and active status.

post.description: Creates a geographic zone polygon (operating area, no-drop, parking hub, or surcharge zone).

parameters.description: Zone payload (boundary as GeoJSON polygon string)
parameters.name: body
